title: Calina Lawrence
summary: October 28, 2019 Calina Lawrence is a Suquamish vocalist and MC from Washington state. Growing up on the Port Madison Indian Reservation, she took Coast Salish canoe journeys every year, with the music of her culture at the beginning of her path as an artist. As a foster kid, Calina credits her spir...

title: Thank YOU!
summary: Amazing! The Fall Fundraiser exceeded our expectations and all because of you, the donors and volunteers who made this 9-day event successful.
